mapper.insert: INSERT cat_user_role SELECT (SELECT id FROM cat_user WHERE deleted='0' AND id=#{userId}) AS userId, (SELECT id FROM cat_role WHERE deleted='0' AND id=#{roleId}) AS role_id, #{createTime} AS createTime

INSERT cat_org_user SELECT IF(#{orgId} = '-1','-1',(SELECT id FROM cat_org WHERE deleted='0' AND id=#{orgId})) AS org_id, (SELECT id FROM cat_user WHERE deleted='0' AND id=#{userId}) AS user_id, #{createTime} AS createTime
mapper.select:
SELECT cu.* FROM cat_user cu INNER JOIN cat_user_role cur ON cu.id = cur.user_id
cu.deleted = 0 and cur.role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT cu.* FROM cat_user cu INNER JOIN cat_user_role cur ON cu.id = cur.user_id
cu.deleted = 0
and 1 = 2
cur.role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT cu.* FROM cat_user cu INNER JOIN cat_org_user cou ON cu.id = cou.user_id
cu.deleted = 0 and cou.org_id = #{orgId}

SELECT cu.* FROM cat_user cu INNER JOIN cat_org_user cou ON cu.id = cou.user_id
cu.deleted = 0
and 1 = 2
cou.org_id = #{orgId}

select * from cat_user
deleted = 0
and 1 = 2
id = #{userId}
